mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY order_date DESC, ordered_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT restaurant_name FROM orders ORDER BY restaurant_name
SELECT DISTINCT menu_name FROM orders ORDER BY menu_name
SELECT DISTINCT orderer_name FROM orders ORDER BY orderer_name
SELECT id, name, emoji, color FROM restaurants ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT m.id as mid, m.name as menu_name, m.emoji, m.price, m.tag, m.description, COUNT(o.id) as cnt FROM orders o JOIN menus m ON m.id = o.menu_id WHERE o.restaurant_id = %s AND m.available = 1 GROUP BY m.id ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT id as mid, name as menu_name, emoji, price, tag, description FROM menus WHERE restaurant_id=%s AND available=1
